title: Basic JavaScript For Loop
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript For Loop. Focus on implementing for loop syntax (init; condition; increment) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript For Loop
description: Create a function that uses for loop syntax (init; condition; increment) and Loop variable scoping together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript For Loop Project
description: Build a small application that applies for loop syntax (init; condition; increment), Loop variable scoping, Nested for loops in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript For Loop
description: The following code has bugs related to for loop syntax (init; condition; increment). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript For Loop
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with for loop syntax (init; condition; increment) and Loop variable scoping.
